originalTitle: How AI rebrands fail to deliver a lasting share price boost
summary: Most of the groups that pivoted have not sustained their valuation gains, an FT analysis has found
content: Most of the groups that pivoted have not sustained their valuation gains, an FT analysis has found
chineseTitle: AI 品牌重塑为何未能带来持久的股价上涨
chineseSummary: 英国《金融时报》分析发现，大多数转型的集团未能维持估值上涨
chineseContent: 英国《金融时报》分析发现，大多数转型的集团未能维持估值上涨
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
